findings.message: New runtime service `widgetizer` is defined only in the dev-scoped overlay `dev.yml` (profiles: ["dev"]). Staging/prod compose `base.yml + <env>.yml + services.yml + observability.yml` and never include `dev.yml`, so `widgetizer` reaches dev only and is silently omitted from staging/prod. This is a real application service (a versioned image wired to the app database via WIDGETIZER_DB_URL), not local-developer-experience tooling (Traefik/mailcatcher/DB admin UI), so it should reach prod.
findings.suggestion: Move the `widgetizer` service to `base.yml` (or to `services.yml` if it is a battery data-store/worker-class component) so it is composed into staging/prod, rather than defining it dev-only. If dev-only is genuinely intended, record that decision in the decisions log instead of silently omitting it.
